====Pokémon====
This listing is of Lorelei's Pokémon in the Pokémon Adventures manga.

{{anchor|Dewgong 3}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lorelei
|pkmn=Dewgong
|gender=female
|type1=Water
|type2=Ice
|img=Lorelei Dewgong Adventures.png
|epnum=PS044
|epname=Do Wrong Dewgong!
|desc={{p|Dewgong}} is one of Lorelei's most used Pokémon. In addition to her using Ice Beam in conjunction with Cloyster's {{m|Spike Cannon}} to create a massive impact, Dewgong has been known to use her Ice attacks for sliding.

Dewgong's known moves are {{m|Aurora Beam}}, {{m|Blizzard}}, and {{m|Ice Beam}}.}}

{{anchor|Cloyster 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|main=yes
|trainer=Lorelei
|pkmn=Cloyster
|type1=Water
|type2=Ice
|img=Lorelei Cloyster Adventures.png
|epnum=PS045
|epname=Cloystered
|desc={{p|Cloyster}} was first used along with Dewgong to trap {{adv|Bill}} and {{adv|Yellow}}. Cloyster was seen to be very strong both defensively and offensive, as it was able to use {{m|Spike Cannon}} to easily trap them. However, it was defeated by a wide variety of characters, typically by exploiting its vulnerabilities.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lorelei
|pkmn=Seel
|type1=Water
|img=Lorelei Seel Adventures.png
|epnum=PS067
|epname=Can You Diglett?
|desc={{p|Seel}} only appeared in a flashback when Lorelei was recalling the time she met [[Agatha]]. It was poisoned by a nearby industrialization and then healed by Agatha's {{p|Gastly}}.

None of Seel's moves are known.}}

{{anchor|Jynx 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lorelei
|pkmn=Jynx
|gender=female
|type1=Ice
|type2=Psychic
|img=Lorelei Jynx Adventures.png
|epnum=PS068
|epname=Jigglypuff Jive
|desc=Lorelei's {{p|Jynx}} was best known for her freezing abilities. She was first seen trying to prevent {{Adv|Red}} from escaping by extending her extremely long hair and using it to grip his neck tightly.

Jynx's known moves are {{m|Ice Beam}}, {{m|Thrash}}, {{m|Pound}}, and {{m|Lovely Kiss}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lorelei
|pkmn=Shellder (multiple)
|type1=Water
|img=Lorelei Shellder Adventures.png
|cap=Lorelei's Shellder
|epnum=PS069
|epname=Playing Horsea
|desc=Lorelei's multiple Shellder were seen attacking the cities in Kanto. Yet, [[Erika]] was one of the Gym Leaders who was trying to stop them from attacking.

Shellder's only known move is {{m|Clamp}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lorelei
|pkmn=Slowbro (multiple)
|type1=Water
|type2=Psychic
|img=Lorelei Slowbro Adventures.png
|epnum=PS069
|epname=Playing Horsea
|desc={{p|Slowbro}} are Pokémon belonging to Lorelei that are not {{type|Ice}} Pokémon. They were used to guard the island from intruders, also using their Shellders to watch behind them. They were first seen while Yellow and the others were flying on a Jigglypuff and Green used her special goggles to see through her {{DL|Green (Adventures)|Horsea}}'s {{m|Smokescreen}}. One of them battled against Green and Sabrina.

One of the Slowbro's known moves is {{m|Amnesia}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lorelei
|pkmn=Slowking
|type1=Water
|type2=Psychic
|img=Lorelei Slowking Adventures.png
|epnum=PS277
|epname=A Beastly Cold Reception
|desc=Slowking is another of Lorelei's non-Ice types. She used it to bail herself out along with Red, Blue, Bill and their Pokémon by using {{m|Dig}}. Although it was first seen in the {{MangaArc|FireRed & LeafGreen}}, its existence was alluded as early as the {{MangaArc|Yellow}}, when Lorelei mentions that had a {{p|Shellder}} bitten a {{p|Slowpoke}} in the head, it would have made the Slowpoke much more formidable.

Slowking's known moves are {{m|Dig}} and {{m|Psychic}}.}}

{{anchor|Lapras 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lorelei
|pkmn=Lapras
|type1=Water
|type2=Ice
|img=Lorelei Lapras Adventures.png
|epnum=PS278
|epname=Put Your Beast Foot Forward
|desc={{p|Lapras}} was seen with Lorelei while on the [[Seagallop]].

None of Lapras's moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lorelei
|pkmn=Shellder
|gender=female
|type1=Water
|img=Lorelei Shellder Icicle Spear Adventures.png
|epnum=PS292
|epname=Bested by Banette
|desc=This {{p|Shellder}} is not part of Lorelei's multiple minions belonging to [[Agatha]]'s army. She was used to save [[Ultima]] from falling.

Shellder's only known move is {{m|Icicle Spear}} and {{m|Clamp}}{{tt|*|revealed on an official site only}}, and her Ability is {{a|Shell Armor}}.}}
